effect.reserved_for: surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only
effect.subject: gold_or_sunshine

quotes: golds are for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only
**Avoid:** Gold or Sunshine text on White (fails contrast) — golds are for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.
Known-safe pairs: Brand Blue, Deep Blue, Dark Navy, Graphite on White/Light Blue/Golden Sand; White on Brand Blue/Deep Blue/Dark Navy.
**Avoid:** Gold or Sunshine text on White (fails contrast) — golds are for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.
Avoid:** Gold or Sunshine text on White (fails contrast) — golds are for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.

governance.exception_scope: golds permitted for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only

intent: Restrict gold/sunshine to non-text uses and steer to legible pairings.
rule_text: Known-safe text/background pairs: Brand Blue (#00529b), Deep Blue (#003D74), Dark Navy (#011E45), Graphite (#212121) on White/Light Blue/Golden Sand; White on Brand Blue/Deep Blue/Dark Navy. Avoid Gold (#ffc60a) or Sunshine (#faa31b) text on White (fails contrast) — golds are for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.
